export const furniture = [
  // ── SOFAS ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  { id:"SF-3S-001", name:"Dawson 3-Seater Sofa", category:"Sofa", subtype:"3-Seater", rooms:["Living Room"], vibes:["Retro","Modern","Ambient"], shop:"Castlery", sourceType:"Local SG", url:"https://www.castlery.com/sg/sofas", sku:"CST-DAW-3S", price:2299, description:"Low-profile silhouette, generous proportions, warm and inviting feel", materials:"Fabric", colours:"Warm grey, Oatmeal", dimensions:"W224 D97 H72cm", quality:"Top seller, strong reviews ★★★★★", rating:5, leadTime:"In stock", availability:"In stock", notes:"Classic HDB living room anchor" },
  { id:"SF-3S-002", name:"Hana 3-Seater Sofa", category:"Sofa", subtype:"3-Seater", rooms:["Living Room"], vibes:["Minimalist","Modern"], shop:"HipVan", sourceType:"Local SG", url:"https://www.hipvan.com", sku:"HV-HANA-3S", price:399, description:"Budget-friendly 3-seater in light grey, clean Scandi lines", materials:"Fabric", colours:"Light Grey", dimensions:"W210 D85 H75cm", quality:"Great entry price, 4.5★", rating:4, leadTime:"In stock", availability:"In stock", notes:"Best budget sofa SG" },
  { id:"SF-SC-001", name:"Wyatt L-Shape Sofa", category:"Sofa", subtype:"Sectional", rooms:["Living Room"], vibes:["Retro","Luxe","Ambient"], shop:"HipVan", sourceType:"Local SG", url:"https://www.hipvan.com", sku:"HV-WYATT-LS", price:1899, description:"Mid-century L-shape in butterscotch premium leather, statement piece", materials:"Leather", colours:"Butterscotch", dimensions:"W280 D160 H80cm", quality:"Statement piece, premium leather ★★★★★", rating:5, leadTime:"In stock", availability:"In stock", notes:"Great for larger HDB / condo" },
  { id:"SF-2S-001", name:"Arturo 2-Seater Sofa Bed", category:"Sofa", subtype:"2-Seater", rooms:["Living Room","Bedroom"], vibes:["Minimalist","Modern"], shop:"HipVan", sourceType:"Local SG", url:"https://www.hipvan.com", sku:"HV-ART-2SB", price:399, description:"Compact sofa bed in granite, doubles as guest bed", materials:"Fabric", colours:"Granite", dimensions:"W160 D85 H75cm", quality:"Good for small spaces ★★★★", rating:4, leadTime:"In stock", availability:"In stock", notes:"Dual function — sofa + bed" },
  { id:"SF-3S-003", name:"Kartell Bubble Club Sofa", category:"Sofa", subtype:"3-Seater", rooms:["Living Room","Outdoor"], vibes:["Modern","Retro","Organic","Luxe"], shop:"Space Furniture", sourceType:"Local SG", url:"https://www.spacefurniture.com.sg", sku:"KRT-BBC-SF", price:2130, description:"Philippe Starck design, soft bubble-like form, indoor/outdoor polyethylene", materials:"Polyethylene", colours:"White, Grey, Black", dimensions:"W200 D95 H75cm", quality:"Iconic design, Philippe Starck ★★★★★", rating:5, leadTime:"In stock", availability:"In stock", notes:"Statement sofa — works indoor or on covered patio" },
  { id:"SF-3S-004", name:"Kartell Uncle Jack Sofa", category:"Sofa", subtype:"3-Seater", rooms:["Living Room"], vibes:["Modern","Retro","Luxe"], shop:"Space Furniture", sourceType:"Local SG", url:"https://www.spacefurniture.com.sg", sku:"KRT-UJ-SF", price:3240, description:"Retro-inspired curved sofa, glossy frame, upholstered seat", materials:"Polycarbonate, Fabric", colours:"Various", dimensions:"W215 D90 H80cm", quality:"Distinctive Kartell design ★★★★★", rating:5, leadTime:"In stock", availability:"In stock", notes:"Best for clients who want a wow-factor retro sofa" },
  { id:"SF-SC-002", name:"Kartell Foliage Sofa", category:"Sofa", subtype:"Sectional", rooms:["Living Room"], vibes:["Modern","Organic","Luxe","Ambient"], shop:"Space Furniture", sourceType:"Local SG", url:"https://www.spacefurniture.com.sg", sku:"KRT-FOL-SC", price:6790, description:"Sculptural sofa with leaf-inspired form by Patricia Urquiola", materials:"Fabric, Metal", colours:"Various", dimensions:"W280 D110 H80cm", quality:"Patricia Urquiola design ★★★★★", rating:5, leadTime:"8–10 weeks", availability:"Pre-order", notes:"Condo / GCB statement living room sofa" },

  // ── CHAIRS ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  { id:"CH-AC-001", name:"Tucson 1-Seater Lounge Chair", category:"Chair", subtype:"Accent", rooms:["Living Room"], vibes:["Retro","Ambient"], shop:"HipVan", sourceType:"Local SG", url:"https://www.hipvan.com", sku:"HV-TUCSON-1S", price:199, description:"Compact armchair in cocoa/espresso, retro rounded form", materials:"Fabric", colours:"Cocoa, Espresso", dimensions:"W80 D78 H76cm", quality:"Budget accent chair, solid build ★★★★", rating:4, leadTime:"In stock", availability:"In stock", notes:"Pairs well with SF-3S-001" },
  { id:"CH-DN-001", name:"Fynn Dining Chair", category:"Chair", subtype:"Dining", rooms:["Dining Room"], vibes:["Minimalist","Japandi"], shop:"HipVan", sourceType:"Local SG", url:"https://www.hipvan.com", sku:"HV-FYNN-DC", price:59, description:"Brushed walnut dining chair with black metal legs, Scandi minimal", materials:"Wood, Metal", colours:"Walnut, Black", dimensions:"W45 D52 H82cm", quality:"Affordable, great for sets of 4–6 ★★★★", rating:4, leadTime:"In stock", availability:"In stock", notes:"Set of 4 = $236" },
  { id:"CH-AC-002", name:"B&B Italia Up Junior Armchair", category:"Chair", subtype:"Accent", rooms:["Living Room","Bedroom"], vibes:["Retro","Modern","Organic","Luxe","Ambient"], shop:"Space Furniture", sourceType:"Local SG", url:"https://www.spacefurniture.com.sg", sku:"BBI-UPJ-CH", price:2880, description:"Iconic B&B Italia Up chair, puffy sculptural form, stretch upholstery", materials:"Foam, Stretch fabric", colours:"Red, White, Teal, various", dimensions:"W80 D85 H80cm", quality:"Gaetano Pesce design icon ★★★★★", rating:5, leadTime:"8–10 weeks", availability:"Pre-order", notes:"Conversation starter — great for bold living room boards" },
  { id:"CH-AC-003", name:"Kartell HiRay Armchair", category:"Chair", subtype:"Accent", rooms:["Living Room","Dining Room"], vibes:["Modern","Minimalist","Luxe"], shop:"Space Furniture", sourceType:"Local SG", url:"https://www.spacefurniture.com.sg", sku:"KRT-HIRAY-CH", price:800, description:"Transparent polycarbonate armchair, Philippe Starck, sleek and lightweight", materials:"Polycarbonate", colours:"Transparent, Smoke, Crystal", dimensions:"W57 D56 H82cm", quality:"Affordable entry to Space / Kartell range ★★★★", rating:4, leadTime:"In stock", availability:"In stock", notes:"Good mid-range designer chair, dining or accent" },
  { id:"CH-AC-004", name:"B&B Italia Husk Swivel Armchair", category:"Chair", subtype:"Accent", rooms:["Living Room"], vibes:["Modern","Organic","Luxe","Ambient"], shop:"Space Furniture", sourceType:"Local SG", url:"https://www.spacefurniture.com.sg", sku:"BBI-HUSK-SW", price:6505, description:"Cocoon-shaped swivel armchair, enveloping snug sides, solid oak frame", materials:"Oak, Fabric", colours:"White + Oak, various", dimensions:"W90 D95 H110cm", quality:"B&B Italia premium quality ★★★★★", rating:5, leadTime:"8–10 weeks", availability:"Pre-order", notes:"Luxury reading / lounge chair — condo or landed" },

  // ── TABLES ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  { id:"TB-CF-001", name:"Blythe Coffee Table", category:"Table", subtype:"Coffee", rooms:["Living Room"], vibes:["Minimalist","Japandi","Modern"], shop:"HipVan", sourceType:"Local SG", url:"https://www.hipvan.com", sku:"HV-BLYTHE-CF", price:249, description:"Natural wood coffee table, clean lines, solid build", materials:"Engineered Wood", colours:"Natural", dimensions:"W100 D60 H45cm", quality:"Popular, good value ★★★★", rating:4, leadTime:"In stock", availability:"In stock", notes:"Pairs with SF-3S-001/002" },
  { id:"TB-SD-001", name:"Garrett Side Table", category:"Table", subtype:"Side", rooms:["Living Room","Bedroom"], vibes:["Modern","Minimalist"], shop:"HipVan", sourceType:"Local SG", url:"https://www.hipvan.com", sku:"HV-GARRETT-ST", price:109, description:"Graphite grey side table, metal frame, compact footprint", materials:"Metal", colours:"Graphite Grey", dimensions:"W45 D45 H55cm", quality:"Great budget side table ★★★★", rating:4, leadTime:"In stock", availability:"In stock", notes:"Good next to lounge chairs" },
  { id:"TB-CF-002", name:"Poliform Creek Coffee Table", category:"Table", subtype:"Coffee", rooms:["Living Room"], vibes:["Modern","Minimalist","Luxe","Japandi"], shop:"Space Furniture", sourceType:"Local SG", url:"https://www.spacefurniture.com.sg", sku:"PLF-CREEK-CF", price:3410, description:"Italian marble and metal coffee table, Poliform precision craftsmanship", materials:"Marble, Metal", colours:"Various marble tops", dimensions:"W120 D60 H35cm", quality:"Poliform Italian quality ★★★★★", rating:5, leadTime:"8–10 weeks", availability:"Pre-order", notes:"Hero coffee table for premium living room boards" },
  { id:"TB-DN-001", name:"Leland Dining Table 1.8m", category:"Table", subtype:"Dining", rooms:["Dining Room"], vibes:["Minimalist","Scandi","Modern"], shop:"HipVan", sourceType:"Local SG", url:"https://www.hipvan.com", sku:"HV-LELAND-DT18", price:599, description:"1.8m Scandi dining table matching Leland console, solid build", materials:"Engineered Wood", colours:"Natural Oak", dimensions:"W180 D90 H75cm", quality:"Bestseller, part of Leland range ★★★★★", rating:5, leadTime:"In stock", availability:"In stock", notes:"Pair with Fynn chairs x4–6" },

  // ── STORAGE ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  { id:"ST-TV-001", name:"Leland TV Console 2m", category:"Storage", subtype:"TV Console", rooms:["Living Room"], vibes:["Minimalist","Scandi"], shop:"HipVan", sourceType:"Local SG", url:"https://www.hipvan.com", sku:"HV-LELAND-TV2", price:849, description:"2m Scandi TV console, clean lines, ample storage", materials:"Engineered Wood", colours:"Natural Oak", dimensions:"W200 D40 H55cm", quality:"Bestseller, clean look ★★★★★", rating:5, leadTime:"In stock", availability:"In stock", notes:"Goes with Leland coffee table" },
  { id:"ST-SH-001", name:"Mileen Leaning Wall Shelf", category:"Storage", subtype:"Shelf", rooms:["Living Room","Bedroom"], vibes:["Minimalist","Modern"], shop:"HipVan", sourceType:"Local SG", url:"https://www.hipvan.com", sku:"HV-MILEEN-WS", price:249, description:"Leaning ladder shelf, 5 tiers, natural finish", materials:"Wood", colours:"Natural", dimensions:"W60 D34 H180cm", quality:"Easy to style, no drilling ★★★★", rating:4, leadTime:"In stock", availability:"In stock", notes:"Good display shelf alternative" },
  { id:"ST-CB-001", name:"Kartell Componibili 3 Storage Unit", category:"Storage", subtype:"Cabinet", rooms:["Living Room","Bedroom","Kitchen"], vibes:["Modern","Minimalist","Retro"], shop:"Space Furniture", sourceType:"Local SG", url:"https://www.spacefurniture.com.sg", sku:"KRT-COMP3-ST", price:320, description:"Anna Castelli Ferrieri 1969 design icon, stackable cylindrical modules", materials:"ABS Plastic", colours:"White, Black, Red, Pink, many", dimensions:"D42 H57cm (3 modules)", quality:"Design classic, 50+ years in production ★★★★★", rating:5, leadTime:"In stock", availability:"In stock", notes:"Affordable Space entry piece — great accent storage" },

  // ── LIGHTING ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  { id:"LT-TL-001", name:"Edison Rattan Table Lamp", category:"Lighting", subtype:"Table Lamp", rooms:["Living Room","Bedroom"], vibes:["Retro","Ambient","Bohemian"], shop:"Taobao — Mua Light Store", sourceType:"Taobao", url:"https://www.taobao.com", sku:"MUA-EDI-TERRA-RTN", price:90, description:"Terracotta ceramic base, rattan shade, warm 2700K glow", materials:"Ceramic, Rattan", colours:"Terracotta", dimensions:"Base H18cm, Shade D30cm", quality:"4.8★ 1,200+ reviews, verified store", rating:5, leadTime:"2-3 weeks", availability:"In stock", notes:"Buy x2 for console symmetry" },
  { id:"LT-FL-001", name:"Arco Arc Floor Lamp", category:"Lighting", subtype:"Floor Lamp", rooms:["Living Room"], vibes:["Retro","Luxe","Ambient"], shop:"Scene Shang", sourceType:"Local SG", url:"https://sceneshang.com", sku:"SS-ARC-BR-OPL", price:420, description:"Brass arc stem, opal glass globe, 2700K, H180cm", materials:"Brass, Glass", colours:"Brass + Opal white", dimensions:"H180cm arc", quality:"SG local brand, quality build ★★★★★", rating:5, leadTime:"In stock", availability:"In stock", notes:"Signature retro lamp, arcs over sofa" },
  { id:"LT-PD-001", name:"Lola Geometric Pendant Lamp", category:"Lighting", subtype:"Pendant", rooms:["Living Room","Dining Room"], vibes:["Modern","Industrial","Grunge"], shop:"HipVan", sourceType:"Local SG", url:"https://www.hipvan.com", sku:"HV-LOLA-PD-BK", price:120, description:"Black geometric pendant, industrial modern look", materials:"Metal", colours:"Matte Black", dimensions:"D40cm", quality:"Popular industrial pendant SG ★★★★", rating:4, leadTime:"In stock", availability:"In stock", notes:"Good over dining table" },
  { id:"LT-TL-002", name:"&klevering Hat Table Lamp", category:"Lighting", subtype:"Table Lamp", rooms:["Living Room","Bedroom"], vibes:["Modern","Retro","Ambient","Luxe"], shop:"Stacked Store", sourceType:"Local SG", url:"https://stackedstore.com", sku:"KLV-HAT-TL", price:200, description:"Sculptural hat-shaped table lamp, design-forward ambient lighting", materials:"Metal, Fabric", colours:"Various", dimensions:"H40cm", quality:"Designer piece, &klevering Dutch brand ★★★★★", rating:5, leadTime:"In stock", availability:"In stock", notes:"Statement lamp, mid-to-premium tier" },
  { id:"LT-TL-003", name:"Hubsch Sleek Table Lamp — Green/Red", category:"Lighting", subtype:"Table Lamp", rooms:["Living Room","Bedroom"], vibes:["Modern","Retro","Grunge","Ambient"], shop:"Stacked Store", sourceType:"Local SG", url:"https://stackedstore.com", sku:"HUB-SLEEK-TL-GR", price:148, description:"Bold colour-block table lamp, Hubsch Danish design, matte finish", materials:"Metal", colours:"Green + Red", dimensions:"H35cm", quality:"Danish design brand, strong colour statement ★★★★★", rating:5, leadTime:"In stock", availability:"In stock", notes:"Good for retro or modern-bold boards" },

  // ── ACCENTS ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  { id:"AC-VS-001", name:"Stoneware Vase Set ×3", category:"Accent", subtype:"Vase", rooms:["Living Room","Bedroom"], vibes:["Retro","Organic","Bohemian"], shop:"In The Mood For Love", sourceType:"Local SG", url:"https://inthemoodforlove.sg", sku:"ITMFL-SW-SET3", price:220, description:"Handmade stoneware, terracotta + sage, heights 18/24/30cm", materials:"Stoneware", colours:"Terracotta, Sage", dimensions:"H18/24/30cm", quality:"Local SG artisan, great quality ★★★★★", rating:5, leadTime:"In stock", availability:"In stock", notes:"Shelf and console styling" },

  { id:"AC-CS-001", name:"Striped Linen Cushion Set ×2", category:"Accent", subtype:"Cushion", rooms:["Living Room","Bedroom"], vibes:["Minimalist","Coastal","Japandi"], shop:"Castlery", sourceType:"Local SG", url:"https://www.castlery.com/sg", sku:"CST-LIN-CUSH-2", price:89, description:"Linen blend cushion covers, neutral stripe, set of 2", materials:"Linen blend", colours:"Beige stripe", dimensions:"45×45cm", quality:"Good quality linen feel ★★★★", rating:4, leadTime:"In stock", availability:"In stock", notes:"Sofa styling, mix textures" },

  { id:"AC-VS-003", name:"Bloomingville Sahal Vase", category:"Accent", subtype:"Vase", rooms:["Living Room","Bedroom"], vibes:["Minimalist","Coastal","Organic","Japandi"], shop:"Stacked Store", sourceType:"Local SG", url:"https://stackedstore.com", sku:"BV-SAHAL-VS", price:62, description:"Wave-textured ceramic vase, matte white finish, ocean-inspired", materials:"Ceramic", colours:"Matte White", dimensions:"H18cm", quality:"Danish design, quality Bloomingville ★★★★", rating:4, leadTime:"In stock", availability:"In stock", notes:"Subtle coastal accent, good for bedroom shelf" },
  { id:"AC-VS-004", name:"Bloomingville Halim Glass Vase", category:"Accent", subtype:"Vase", rooms:["Living Room","Bedroom"], vibes:["Minimalist","Modern","Ambient"], shop:"Stacked Store", sourceType:"Local SG", url:"https://stackedstore.com", sku:"BV-HALIM-VS", price:55, description:"Distinctive white-toned glass vase, elegant for florals or string lights", materials:"Glass", colours:"White", dimensions:"H24cm", quality:"Elegant glass, Danish design ★★★★", rating:4, leadTime:"In stock", availability:"In stock", notes:"Good for dried stems or single stems" },
